subject: Been heads down, here's what shipped
preheader: A quick founder note on what's new in Marrow, and the fastest way to try it.
text:
Hey,

You signed up for Marrow a little while ago. We've shipped a lot since then, and I wanted to close the loop personally.

A few user-visible things are live now:
- Improvement metrics: after roughly 20 decisions or 7 days, Marrow starts showing whether your agent is actually getting faster.
- Agent-narrated milestones: when something meaningful happens, the product now says it plainly instead of burying it in logs.
- Velocity tracking: you can see whether an agent is moving faster or just generating more noise.
- Passive mode: Claude Code setup now installs automatic logging, and direct Node agents can use `autoWrap()`.

Fastest way to see it in action:

`npx @getmarrow/mcp setup --api-key {{api_key}}`

If you want to give it another spin, that's the cleanest place to start. Reply if anything still feels rough. I read those myself.

Buu
founder, Marrow
html:
A quick founder note on what's new in Marrow, and the fastest way to try it.
 
From Buu

Been heads down, here's what shipped.

You signed up for Marrow a little while ago. We've shipped a lot since then, and I wanted to close the loop personally.

• Improvement metrics: after roughly 20 decisions or 7 days, Marrow starts showing whether your agent is actually getting faster.
• Agent-narrated milestones: when something meaningful happens, the product now says it plainly instead of burying it in logs.
• Velocity tracking: you can see whether an agent is moving faster or just generating more noise.
• Passive mode: Claude Code setup now installs automatic logging, and direct Node agents can use autoWrap().

Fastest way to try it

npx @getmarrow/mcp setup --api-key {{api_key}}

If you want to give it another spin, that's the cleanest place to start. Reply if anything still feels rough. I read those myself.

Buu
founder, Marrow

Unsubscribe
Marrow · made by Buu and a small team.
